message:
feat: Add system prompt caching for server mode (Phase 4)

Extend scheduler's prefix cache to support full system prompts:
- Increase hash prefix from 32 to 128 tokens for better cache accuracy
- Increase cached token count from 32 to 1024 for full system prompts
- Add system prompt tracking in server for cache hit logging

This enables ~3x memory savings when multiple users share the same
system prompt, as the KV cache for the prefix is reused instead of
recomputed for each request.
